title: copier.PutOptions: add StripSetuidBit/StripSetgidBit/StripStickyBit
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add `StripSetuidBit`/`StripSetgidBit`/`StripStickyBit` flags to `copier.PutOptions`, that are interpreted similarly to their counterparts in `copier.GetOptions`.

#### How to verify it

More unit tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
